motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def findOrder(self, numCourses: int, prerequisites: List[List[int]]) -> List[int]:
    courses = sorted(set(prerequisites), key=lambda x: x[1])
    courses.reverse()
    result = []
    for course in courses:
        result.append(course[0])
        for next_course in courses:
            if next_course[0] > course[0]:
                break
            result.append(next_course[0])
    return result

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n.log(n))
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
